name: Siva Kalyan Karicheti
headline: I build practical systems where artificial intelligence, enterprise software and data meet.
aboutPrimary: I am an MSc Artificial Intelligence student at ECE Engineering School in Paris, with a B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering and hands-on ERP development experience.
aboutSecondary: My work spans SAP ABAP, Python, data visualization and web technologies. I enjoy turning technical requirements into reliable solutions and learning the system deeply enough to improve it.

experience.title: MSc in Artificial Intelligence
experience.description: Developing advanced foundations in AI while connecting them to real-world software and data problems.

experience.title: ERP Developer
experience.description: Supported ERP development, customization and maintenance; wrote and modified code, helped configure systems, troubleshot issues and created technical documentation.

experience.title: B.Tech, Computer Science & Engineering
experience.organization: Anil Neerukonda Institute of Technology and Sciences
experience.description: Graduated with a 7.5 GPA and completed a final-year IoT safety research project presented at an international conference.

projects.title: NVIDIA logistics workflows
projects.description: Developed Smart Forms for packing lists, commercial invoices and bills of lading; built ALV programs for POD updates; integrated carrier data and updated delivery tracking with BAdI implementations.

projects.title: GuardianAir
projects.description: A sensor-driven airbag inflation concept designed to reduce Sudden Infant Death Syndrome risk through real-time sleep monitoring and responsive IoT safety mechanisms.

projects.title: Puzzle game
projects.description: A browser-based puzzle game combining a responsive front end with a PHP backend connection.

achievements.title: International conference publication
achievements.description: GuardianAir research was presented at the International Conference on Data Science and Artificial Intelligence (ICDSAI 2024).

achievements.title: Enterprise logistics delivery
achievements.description: Delivered SAP ABAP forms, ALV programs, integrations and production support for logistics workflows.
